name: MyParcel
summary: Create MyParcel labels for PostNL, DHL and DPD in seconds. Tracking flows back to your channels automatically.
tagline: The number 1 shipping platform for online entrepreneurs
about: MyParcel is a shipping platform for online stores. It helps you send parcels easily through carriers such as PostNL and DHL. You can create shipping labels, offer Track & Trace and manage returns. This makes shipping faster and easier to keep track of for webshops.

faqs.q: Are address details added to the shipping label automatically?
faqs.a: Yes, based on the shipping details of an order we request a shipping label from MyParcel. You can adjust the address details manually if needed.
